/usr/bin/c++ -W -Wall -pedantic -Wno-non-virtual-dtor -Wno-long-long -Wwrite-strings -Wpointer-arith -Woverloaded-virtual -Wno-variadic-macros -Wshadow -pipe -pthread -ftls-model=initial-exec -std=c++17  -g -g CMakeFiles/neutrino.dir/DetectorConstruction.cc.o CMakeFiles/neutrino.dir/DetectorMessenger.cc.o CMakeFiles/neutrino.dir/PrimaryGenerator.cc.o CMakeFiles/neutrino.dir/PrimaryGeneratorMessenger.cc.o CMakeFiles/neutrino.dir/MyNeutrinoPhysics.cc.o CMakeFiles/neutrino.dir/MyPhysicsList.cc.o CMakeFiles/neutrino.dir/RunAction.cc.o CMakeFiles/neutrino.dir/EventAction.cc.o CMakeFiles/neutrino.dir/SteppingAction.cc.o CMakeFiles/neutrino.dir/main.cc.o -o neutrino  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/root/lib:/opt/geant4-install/lib /opt/root/lib/libCore.so /opt/root/lib/libImt.so /opt/root/lib/libRIO.so /opt/root/lib/libNet.so /opt/root/lib/libHist.so /opt/root/lib/libGraf.so /opt/root/lib/libGraf3d.so /opt/root/lib/libGpad.so /opt/root/lib/libROOTDataFrame.so /opt/root/lib/libTree.so /opt/root/lib/libTreePlayer.so /opt/root/lib/libRint.so /opt/root/lib/libPostscript.so /opt/root/lib/libMatrix.so /opt/root/lib/libPhysics.so /opt/root/lib/libMathCore.so /opt/root/lib/libThread.so /opt/root/lib/libMultiProc.so /opt/root/lib/libROOTVecOps.so /opt/geant4-install/lib/libG4Tree.so /opt/geant4-install/lib/libG4FR.so /opt/geant4-install/lib/libG4GMocren.so /opt/geant4-install/lib/libG4visHepRep.so /opt/geant4-install/lib/libG4RayTracer.so /opt/geant4-install/lib/libG4VRML.so /opt/geant4-install/lib/libG4vis_management.so /opt/geant4-install/lib/libG4modeling.so /opt/geant4-install/lib/libG4interfaces.so /opt/geant4-install/lib/libG4persistency.so /opt/geant4-install/lib/libG4error_propagation.so /opt/geant4-install/lib/libG4readout.so /opt/geant4-install/lib/libG4physicslists.so /opt/geant4-install/lib/libG4tasking.so
